description_long: This is a three-seater couch upholstered in dark brown leather with a glossy finish. The backrest features deep button tufting, creating a plush, quilted appearance, while the seat consists of two large, smooth cushions. The armrests are wide and slightly rounded, matching the overall padded and comfortable look of the couch. The legs are short, exposed, and made of wood, providing a sturdy base and a slight elevation from the ground. The rear of the couch is fully upholstered in the same leather, with a gently curved top edge. The overall design is classic and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark brown leather couch with deep button tufting on the backrest, two large seat cushions, rounded armrests, and short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, two seat cushions, and rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered back with a gently curved top edge and visible wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the armrest and seat depth visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, smooth seat cushions and a single continuous backrest with deep button tufting; all cushions are attached and integrated, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark brown leather with a glossy finish and deep button tufting on the backrest, creating a quilted, diamond pattern.
attribute_leg_style: Short, exposed wooden legs with a simple, straight design and a slight taper; legs are positioned at each corner and provide moderate elevation.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are wide, rounded, and padded, extending slightly outward from the seat and matching the leather upholstery of the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with deep button tufting; the backrest is attached and fully cushioned, featuring a gently curved top edge.
